summary: Comprehensive testing of Polish work report app completed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical user flows tested and working. Both admin and user roles tested successfully.

issues: Console warning: 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Please use Pressable.' - Consider migrating to Pressable component
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - Update to use style-based pointerEvents

action_items: Consider migrating from TouchableWithoutFeedback to Pressable to remove deprecation warnings
Update pointerEvents usage from props to style-based approach
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend properly implements JWT Bearer token authentication
✓ Bcrypt password hashing implemented correctly with $2b$ format
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from API responses
✓ Proper HTTP status codes (200, 400, 401, 403, 404) with Polish error messages
✓ Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment variables
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput)
✓ All text wrapped in Text components
✓ Auth context properly manages token storage (SecureStore for native, localStorage for web)
✓ Role-based navigation implemented correctly (admin sees questions/settings, user sees report tab)
✓ Backend validation prevents creating duplicate open reports
✓ PDF generation and sharing implemented for both web and native platforms

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows working, minor deprecation warnings only)

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. App uses existing seeded data: 2 users (admin, pracownik), 7 default questions, default settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI renders properly on mobile viewport. Auth flow works for both admin and user roles. Only minor deprecation warnings present (TouchableWithoutFeedback, pointerEvents props).

auth.admin_login: ✓ PASS - Returns token and user object with role=admin
auth.user_login: ✓ PASS - Returns token and user object with role=user
auth.invalid_credentials: ✓ PASS - Returns 401 with Polish error message
auth.auth_me_admin: ✓ PASS - Returns admin user data with valid token
auth.auth_me_user: ✓ PASS - Returns user data with valid token

questions.get_all_as_admin: ✓ PASS - Returns all questions (active and inactive)
questions.create_question: ✓ PASS - Creates question and verifies persistence
questions.update_question: ✓ PASS - Updates question and verifies changes
questions.delete_question: ✓ PASS - Deletes question and verifies removal

reports.create_report: ✓ PASS - Creates report and verifies persistence
reports.get_open_report: ✓ PASS - Returns open report or null
reports.prevent_duplicate: ✓ PASS - Returns 400 when trying to create report while one is open
reports.close_report: ✓ PASS - Closes report and updates status
reports.get_all_reports_admin: ✓ PASS - Returns all reports for admin

settings.update_settings_admin: ✓ PASS - Updates settings and verifies changes

login_flows.invalid_credentials: ✓ PASS - Shows error message 'Nieprawidlowy email lub haslo'
login_flows.admin_login: ✓ PASS - Redirects to questions tab after login
login_flows.user_login: ✓ PASS - Redirects to report tab after login

admin_features.view_questions_list: ✓ PASS - Questions list visible with 9 questions
admin_features.add_question_modal: ✓ PASS - Modal opens with text input and category selection
admin_features.navigate_to_settings: ✓ PASS - Settings tab shows notification configuration
admin_features.navigate_to_history: ✓ PASS - History tab accessible (labeled 'RAPORTY' for admin)
admin_features.logout: ✓ PASS - Logout button present in settings tab

user_features.fill_and_submit_report: ✓ PASS - Form accepts input and submits successfully
user_features.view_open_report: ✓ PASS - Open report displays with close button (testID='close-report-btn')
user_features.close_report: ✓ PASS - Close button triggers confirmation dialog
user_features.navigate_to_history: ✓ PASS - History shows 2 reports with 'ZAMKNIETY' status
user_features.view_report_detail: ✓ PASS - Detail page shows report with all answers
user_features.pdf_share_button: ✓ PASS - PDF button present (testID='share-report-btn') in top right
user_features.logout: ✓ PASS - Logout button present in report and history tabs
